records.heading: Observe RHP-016.0 sealed commit/current HEAD
records.why: RHP-016.1 observes the RHP-016.0 commit CI state.

records.heading: Create scoped CI observation packet
records.command: C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe -m rhp.ci_observation --subject-commit 1b61c682805e7083e5c410af705898ed4a373102 --ci-status pending --source operator-provided --prior-operation RHP-016.0 --out C:\Users\jacks\OneDrive\Desktop\hermes-agent-evo\docs\context-layer\ops\RHP-016-1-current-commit-ci-observation-doctor-cli\current-commit-ci-observation.json
records.why: A CI observation must name exactly which commit it describes.

records.heading: Run read-only doctor CLI wrapper
records.why: Expose a simple cockpit command without granting authority.

records.heading: Compile RHP-016.1 observation/doctor CLI surfaces
records.command: C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe -m py_compile rhp/ci_observation.py rhp/doctor_cli.py tests/test_rhp_016_1_ci_observation.py tests/test_rhp_016_1_doctor_cli.py
records.why: Catch syntax/import issues before focused tests.

records.heading: Run current observation/doctor CLI focused tests
records.command: C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe -m pytest -q -o addopts= tests/test_rhp_016_1_ci_observation.py tests/test_rhp_016_1_doctor_cli.py tests/test_rhp_016_0_green_reconciliation.py
records.why: Prove CI observation, doctor CLI, and green reconciliation before push.
